About.title: About Us
About.description: Forma-Cert is the leading EU-grade professional training and certification platform, connecting learners, trainers, and institutions.
About.whoWeAreP1: Forma-Cert is a comprehensive training and certification platform designed to meet the professional development needs of individuals, organizations, and institutions across the European Union.
About.whoWeAreP2: We bridge the gap between quality education and professional advancement by offering EU-recognized certifications, expert-led courses, and flexible learning pathways.
About.ourMissionDesc: To provide accessible, high quality professional training that empowers learners to advance their careers, support trainers to share their expertise, and enables institutions to develop their teams.
About.ourVisionDesc: To become the most trusted platform for professional development in Europe, where quality meets accessibility and where learners everywhere can access world-class training and credible certifications.
About.forLearnersDesc: We provide access to professional courses, interactive training, and EU-recognized certifications to advance your career.
About.forTrainersDesc: We offer trainers tools, courses, and resources to create, deliver and manage training with maximum impact on professionals.
About.forInstitutionsDesc: We help schools, universities, and businesses enhance their offerings by integrating top-tier training into their programs.
About.trustP1: All certifications on Forma-Cert meet rigorous EU standards and are recognized by employers and institutions across Europe. We partner only with accredited trainers and organizations to ensure the highest quality of education.
About.trustP2: Our platform is built on transparency, trust, and commitment to professional excellence. Every course, every certification, and every partnership is designed with your success in mind.
About.ctaDescription: Join Forma-Cert today and take the next step in your professional development.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to common questions about Forma-Cert, courses, certifications, and more.
FAQ.a1: Forma-Cert is a professional training and certification platform that connects learners, trainers, and institutions. We offer EU-grade certifications and expert-led courses across multiple industries.
FAQ.a2: Yes! All certifications on Forma-Cert meet rigorous EU standards and are designed by professionals in collaboration with EU-level bodies. They are recognized by employers and institutions across Europe.
FAQ.q3: How do I create an account?
FAQ.a3: Simply click on "Sign Up" in the navigation menu, choose your account type (Learner, Trainer, or Organization), fill in your details, and verify your email address to get started.
FAQ.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for institutional clients. All payments are processed securely through our encrypted payment gateway.
FAQ.a5: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all courses. If you're not satisfied with a course within 14 days of purchase and haven't completed more than 30% of the content, you can request a full refund.
FAQ.q6: How long do I have access to a course?
FAQ.a6: Once you enroll in a course, you have lifetime access to all course materials, including any future updates. You can learn at your own pace and revisit the content anytime.
FAQ.q7: Do you offer certificates for course completion?
FAQ.a7: Yes! Upon successful completion of a course and passing the final assessment, you'll receive an EU-grade certificate that you can download and share with employers or on professional networks.
FAQ.q8: Can I become a trainer on Forma-Cert?
FAQ.a8: Absolutely! We welcome experienced professionals to become trainers. You'll need to submit your credentials and go through our verification process. Once approved, you can create and publish courses.
FAQ.q9: How do institutions partner with Forma-Cert?
FAQ.a9: Schools, universities, and organizations can partner with Forma-Cert to offer our courses to their students or employees. Contact our partnerships team to discuss custom solutions and pricing.
FAQ.q10: Is there a mobile app available?
FAQ.a10: Currently, Forma-Cert is fully responsive and works seamlessly on all devices through your web browser. We're working on dedicated mobile apps for iOS and Android, coming soon!

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Get in touch with our team. We're here to help with any questions about courses, certifications, or partnerships.
Contact.subject: Subject

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.description: Discover how Forma-Cert connects learners, trainers, and schools to create a meaningful and world-class training experience.
HowItWorks.learnerStep1Desc: Explore thousands of courses across multiple categories. Filter by certification type, learning mode, and more.
HowItWorks.learnerStep2Desc: Choose online or in-person courses. Learn at your own pace with expert instructors and comprehensive materials.
HowItWorks.learnerStep3Desc: Complete your course and earn EU-recognized certifications that employers value and trust.
HowItWorks.trainerStep1Desc: Submit your credentials and expertise. Our team verifies your qualifications to ensure quality standards.
HowItWorks.trainerStep2Desc: Build your course content, set your pricing, and publish to thousands of potential learners.
HowItWorks.trainerStep3Desc: Share your expertise, engage with students, and earn income from your professional knowledge.
HowItWorks.schoolStep1Desc: Apply for accreditation and verification. We ensure your institution meets EU quality standards.
HowItWorks.schoolStep2Desc: Upload your complete course catalog and make it available to thousands of potential students.
HowItWorks.schoolStep3Desc: Connect with learners across Europe, expand your institutional presence, and grow enrollments.
HowItWorks.ctaDescription: Join thousands of learners, trainers, and institutions on Forma-Cert today.

Courses.title: Browse All Courses
Courses.description: Discover professional courses with EU-recognized certifications. Filter by category, level, and learning mode.

Categories.title: All Categories
Categories.description: Browse our complete catalog of recognized training categories.
Categories.cat1Desc: Training and professional development for health and wellness professionals.
Categories.cat2Desc: Training and professional development for teachers, administrative school staff (ATA), and the academic sector.
Categories.cat3Desc: Mandatory, general, and specialized training in the workplace.
Categories.cat4Desc: Essential skills for business management and the integration of quality, environmental, and sustainability criteria.
Categories.cat5Title: Area 5. Professional Orders and Professional Associations
Categories.cat5Desc: Mandatory and voluntary training for professional registration and continuing professional development.
Categories.cat6Desc: Specialized training for advanced technical-professional and operational skills.
Categories.cat7Title: Area 7. Social, Socio-Health and Third Sector
Categories.cat7Desc: Training and skills for the social, socio-health, non-profit, volunteering, and cooperative sectors.
Categories.cat8Desc: Training pathways for IT professionals and continuously evolving digital technologies.
Categories.cat9Desc: Language training: English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, etc.
Categories.cat10Title: Area 10. Personal Development and Soft Skills
Categories.cat10Desc: Pathways dedicated to personal growth, communication, leadership, and transversal skills.
Categories.cat11Desc: Training on sales techniques, marketing, and effective negotiation.
Categories.cat12Desc: Training for the tourism, hospitality, cultural enhancement, and reception services sectors.
Categories.cat13Desc: Administrative, accounting, fiscal, and financial management skills for organizations and companies.
Categories.cat14Desc: Training in creative, artistic, multimedia, and visual design fields.
Categories.cat15Desc: Training pathways for the sports, fitness, athletic training, and physical activity sectors.
Categories.cat16Desc: Training for agricultural, agri-food, enogastronomic supply chains and rural development.
Categories.cat17Title: Area 17. Logistics, Transport and International Trade
Categories.cat17Desc: Skills for managing logistics, transport, supply chain, and national and international trade exchanges.
Categories.cat18Desc: Transversal training and certifications not attributable to a single specific sector, useful in different professional fields.

Certifications.trainersDescription: Learn from industry professionals with years of experience in their respective fields. Our trainers are committed to helping you achieve your certification goals.
Certifications.trainer1Bio: Over 15 years of experience in occupational health and safety training. Certified Lead Auditor ISO 45001 and specialist in workplace risk assessment.
Certifications.trainer2Bio: Expert in innovative teaching methodologies and digital education. PhD in Educational Sciences with focus on inclusive learning strategies.
Certifications.trainer3Bio: Industrial automation engineer with extensive experience in CNC programming, PLC systems, and Industry 4.0 technologies.
Certifications.trainer4Bio: Lead Auditor for ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001. Expert in integrated management systems and corporate sustainability strategies.
Certifications.trainer5Bio: Chartered accountant and financial advisor with 20+ years helping businesses optimize their administrative and fiscal processes.
Certifications.trainer6Bio: Certified specialist in digital competencies, cybersecurity, and cloud computing. Microsoft and Google certified educator.

ForTrainers.doYouWantToTeach: Do You Want to Teach with Us?
ForTrainers.doYouWantToTeachDesc: Forma-Cert is looking for qualified trainers ready to share their knowledge through the platform. Thanks to an intuitive publishing system and an established audience, you will be able to create, manage and sell your courses easily and professionally. We handle the technology — you focus on the content.
ForTrainers.noUpfrontCostsDesc: Competitive revenue share on every course enrollment. Top instructors earn €50,000+ annually.
ForTrainers.noTechnicalSkillsDesc: Access to over 500,000 active learners across Europe seeking quality training.
ForTrainers.fullControlDesc: Establish yourself as an industry expert and grow your professional reputation.
ForTrainers.officialCertDesc: Create and teach courses on your own schedule. Work from anywhere.
ForTrainers.continuousSupportDesc: Comprehensive tools, resources, and dedicated support to help you succeed.
ForTrainers.visibilityDesc: Enterprise-grade platform with all the features you need to deliver quality training.
ForTrainers.step1Desc: Sign up, verify your credentials, and build your professional profile.
ForTrainers.step2Desc: Use our intuitive tools to create engaging content, add materials, and structure your curriculum.
ForTrainers.step3Desc: Our team reviews your course to ensure it meets our quality standards.
ForTrainers.step4Desc: Your course goes live on Forma-Cert. Start teaching, earn revenue, and grow your audience.
ForTrainers.opportunityTitle: A real opportunity for certified trainers.
ForTrainers.opportunityDesc: Whether you're an individual professional, a training school, or a company, Forma-Cert gives you the tools, visibility, and technology to turn your expertise into results.
ForTrainers.ongoingSupportDesc: We don't just give you the tools — we walk with you.
ForTrainers.dedicatedOnboardingDesc: Step-by-step guidance to set up your profile and create your first course.
ForTrainers.technicalAssistanceDesc: Our support team is available to help with uploading, formatting, and publishing.
ForTrainers.contentOptimizationDesc: Learn best practices for creating effective and engaging training content.
ForTrainers.marketingVisibilityDesc: We help promote your courses to the right audience through the platform.
ForTrainers.ctaDescription: Join our community of professional trainers and share your expertise with thousands of learners across Europe.
ForTrainers.youCreate: You create the course, we certify it, publish it, promote it, and sell it.
ForTrainers.step2Extra: You can create your course at your own pace and update it anytime
ForTrainers.step3Extra: Certification increases the value and credibility of your course
ForTrainers.step4List3: Receive payments according to the agreed terms
ForTrainers.step4Extra: You teach, we handle the commercial side
ForTrainers.ongoingSupportTeamIntro: Our team supports you at every stage:
ForTrainers.opportunityTagline: If you can teach something, you can turn it into a course.
ForTrainers.whatYouDontDoTitle: What You Don't Have to Do
ForTrainers.dontNeedWebsite: You don't need to create a website
ForTrainers.dontNeedPayments: You don't need to manage payments
ForTrainers.dontNeedAds: You don't need to run advertising
ForTrainers.dontNeedTech: You don't need to handle technical aspects
ForTrainers.dontNeedTagline: We take care of everything except teaching.

ForSchool.bannerDescription: Publish your catalog and sell online.
ForSchool.aboutTitle: A Digital Platform for Your School
ForSchool.aboutDesc: Forma-Cert provides schools and institutions with a complete, ready-to-use digital infrastructure to host, manage, and sell training programs online.
ForSchool.fullDigitalCatalogDesc: Upload and manage all your courses in one place with a stunning online catalog.
ForSchool.registrationTrackingDesc: Manage student registrations, track progress, and generate performance reports.
ForSchool.certificationIssuanceDesc: Automatically generate and deliver certificates upon course completion.
ForSchool.integratedPaymentsDesc: Accept payments securely with our integrated payment processing.
ForSchool.analyticsInsightsDesc: Access comprehensive data and reports on enrollment, completion, and revenue.
ForSchool.brandedExperienceDesc: Customize the platform with your school's branding for a seamless experience.
ForSchool.step1Desc: Submit your school's credentials and course catalog for review.
ForSchool.step2Desc: Configure your school's profile, branding, and course offerings.
ForSchool.step3Desc: Upload course content, set pricing, and make them available to learners.
ForSchool.step4Desc: Attract students, manage enrollments, and earn revenue from your programs.
ForSchool.step2SubDesc: You stay in full control of your content.
ForSchool.step3SubDesc: Certified courses gain higher credibility and value.
ForSchool.step4Item3: Listed in the most relevant categories
ForSchool.step5Desc: Your courses are sold online and you start earning
ForSchool.step5Item3: Receive payments according to agreed terms
ForSchool.step5SubDesc: You focus on training, we manage the commercial process
ForSchool.aboutSubDesc: You create the courses. We certify them, publish them, promote them, and sell them.
ForSchool.solutionsSubDesc: If you offer quality training, we help you sell it online.
ForSchool.whatYouDontDoTitle: What You DON'T Have to Do
ForSchool.dontSubDesc: We take care of everything except delivering the training.
ForSchool.dedicatedSupportIntro: You are never alone. Our team supports your institution at every stage:
ForSchool.solutionsTitle: Tailored solutions for different educational needs
ForSchool.solutionsDesc: Whether you're a school, university, or training center, we have the right solution for you.
ForSchool.vocationalSchoolsDesc: Offer certified professional courses and manage student enrollment online.
ForSchool.universitiesDesc: Extend your course offerings with online programs and EU-recognized certifications.
ForSchool.trainingCentersDesc: Digitize your training catalog and reach more students across Europe.
ForSchool.whatYouCanDo: What you can do with Forma-Cert
ForSchool.whatYouCanDoDesc: Our platform gives schools everything they need to succeed in digital education.
ForSchool.publishCoursesDesc: Create and publish both online and in-person training courses.
ForSchool.manageCertificatesDesc: Automatically issue certificates to students who complete programs.
ForSchool.trackProgressDesc: Monitor student progress with detailed analytics and reports.
ForSchool.ctaDescription: Join Forma-Cert and reach thousands of students across Europe.

Partnerships.bannerDescription: Join our network and grow together.
Partnerships.aboutDesc: Forma-Cert's partnership program empowers organizations to become territorial orientation centers, connecting local communities with quality training and certification opportunities.
Partnerships.localPresenceDesc: Become the reference point for professional training in your area.
Partnerships.revenueSharingDesc: Earn competitive revenue shares on every enrollment you facilitate.
Partnerships.brandRecognitionDesc: Associate your brand with EU-grade training excellence.
Partnerships.dedicatedSupportDesc: Get dedicated support and resources from the Forma-Cert team.
Partnerships.marketingMaterialsDesc: Access professional marketing tools and co-branded materials.
Partnerships.exclusiveTerritoryDesc: Secure exclusive partnership rights in your geographical area.
Partnerships.step1Desc: Submit your application and tell us about your organization and goals.
Partnerships.step2Desc: Our team reviews your application and provides onboarding support.
Partnerships.step3Desc: Begin promoting Forma-Cert courses and certifications in your area.
Partnerships.step4Desc: Earn revenue on every enrollment and grow your local presence.
Partnerships.opportunityTitle: A unique opportunity for local organizations
Partnerships.opportunityDesc: Whether you're a consulting firm, an employment agency, or a local institution, Forma-Cert gives you the tools and support to become a training hub in your area.
Partnerships.ctaDescription: Join our network and help bring quality training to your community.
Partnerships.aboutSubDesc: You create the courses. We certify, publish, promote, and sell them.
Partnerships.localGuidanceCenterTitle: What Is a Local Guidance Center
Partnerships.localGuidanceCenterIntro: A Local Guidance Center is an official partner of the platform that operates locally to:
Partnerships.localGuidanceItem4: connect the territory with schools, institutions, and trainers
Partnerships.localGuidanceCenterOutro: You are the point of contact between education and people.
Partnerships.affiliateCodeIntro: Once accredited as a Local Guidance Center, you will be assigned a personal and unique affiliate code.
Partnerships.affiliateItem1: The code must be indicated in every course referral or purchase
Partnerships.affiliateItem2: Each course purchased using your code is automatically tracked
Partnerships.affiliateItem3: The system recognizes your guidance activity
Partnerships.affiliateOutro: The code is the tool that certifies your contribution and guarantees your earnings.
Partnerships.whyBecomeAffiliateIntro: Becoming a Local Guidance Center allows you to
Partnerships.whatCanDoTitle: What You Can Do as a Local Guidance Center
Partnerships.canDoItem2: Use the catalog available on the platform.
Partnerships.canDoItem4: Help people choose the most suitable learning path.
Partnerships.canDoItem5: Sell Courses Using Your Affiliate Code
Partnerships.canDoItem6: Each tracked sale generates a percentage-based earning.
Partnerships.canDoItem7: Collaborate with Schools and Training Institutions
Partnerships.canDoItem8: Become their territorial point of reference
Partnerships.oppItem6: Organizations operating between education and employment
Partnerships.oppSubDesc: If you help people make choices, you can turn it into value.
Partnerships.partnerDontDoTitle: What You DON'T Have to Do
Partnerships.partnerDontSubDesc: The affiliate system works fully automatically.
Partnerships.partnerDedicatedSupportIntro: As an affiliated Center, you receive:
Partnerships.partnerSupportItem4: Assistance with the use of the affiliate code

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
Privacy.section1Desc: Forma-Cert SRL ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our platform and use our services.
Privacy.section2Intro: We may collect personal information that you provide to us, such as:
Privacy.pd1: Name and contact information (email address, phone number)
Privacy.pd4: Payment information (processed securely through third-party payment processors)
Privacy.ud1: We automatically collect information about your device and how you interact with our platform, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent on pages, and other diagnostic data.
Privacy.section3Intro: We use the information we collect to:
Privacy.use1: Provide, operate, and maintain our services
Privacy.use2: Process your course enrollments and certifications
Privacy.use3: Send you course updates, notifications, and marketing communications
Privacy.use5: Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
Privacy.use6: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues and fraud
Privacy.section4Intro: Forma-Cert complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). If you are a resident of the European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, including:
Privacy.gdpr1: Right to access your personal data
Privacy.gdpr2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
Privacy.gdpr3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
Privacy.section5Intro: We do not sell your personal information. However, we may share your information with:
Privacy.share1: Course instructors and training institutions (limited to enrollment information)
Privacy.share2: Service providers who assist in operating our platform
Privacy.share4: Legal authorities when required by law
Privacy.section6Desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
Privacy.section7Desc: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
Privacy.section8Desc: You can update your account information, unsubscribe from marketing communications, or request deletion of your data by contacting us at privacy@Forma-Cert.eu.
Privacy.section9Desc: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
Privacy.section10Desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
Privacy.section11Intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
Privacy.contactAddress: Forma-Cert SRL, Via Roma 123, 20121 Milano, Italy

Cookie.title: Cookie Policy
Cookie.description: Learn about how we use cookies on our platform.
Cookie.section1Desc: Forma-Cert SRL is dedicated to ensuring transparency and protecting your privacy. This Cookie Policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our platform.
Cookie.section2Intro: We utilize the following types of cookies:
Cookie.cookie1: Essential cookies (necessary for basic site functionality)
Cookie.cookie2: Performance cookies (analyze site usage to improve performance)
Cookie.cookie3: Functional cookies (enhance user experience with personalized features)
Cookie.cookie4: Advertising cookies (track browsing habits to deliver targeted ads)
Cookie.cookie5: Third-party cookies (set by external services integrated into our site)
Cookie.cu2: Understand how you interact with our Site
Cookie.cu4: Analyze site traffic and user behavior
Cookie.section4Desc: Personalize your experience and remember your preferences
Cookie.cp3: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. You can choose to block all cookies, accept only essential cookies, or accept all cookies.
Cookie.cp4: For more details on how we handle data, please see our Privacy Policy.
Cookie.section5Desc: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. If you have any questions or concerns about our use of cookies, please contact us:
Cookie.contactAddress: Forma-Cert SRL, Via Roma 123, 20121 Milano, Italy
Cookie.section5Consent: By continuing to use our Site, you consent to our use of cookies as described in this policy.
Cookie.section6Intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
Cookie.cs1: Legal authorities when required by law
Cookie.cs3: Service providers who assist in operating our platform
Cookie.section7Desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
Cookie.section8Desc: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
Cookie.section9Desc: You can update your account information, unsubscribe from marketing communications, or request deletion of your data by contacting us at privacy@Forma-Cert.eu.
Cookie.section10Desc: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
Cookie.section11Desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
Cookie.section12Intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
